case_title: DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP. VS. VANDA PEREIRA-AQUINO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,471.17 FILED BY DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT PEREIRA-AQUINO, VANDA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-25-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00) SERVED MAR-30-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PEREIRA-AQUINO, VANDA
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE JEAN MILEFF. FILED BY DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-25-2011 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO AUG-24-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-24-2011 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO NOV-16-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-30-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-30-2012 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY CLAUDIA BARDALES--LEGAL SERVICES SUPERVISOR. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506).
RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED 11/1/12 TO DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT PEREIRA-AQUINO, VANDA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-30-2012 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-16-2011 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAR-27-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCE, CONTINUE FOR 6 MONTHS FOR PROGRESS REPORT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-27-2012 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO SEP-11-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PEREIRA-AQUINO, VANDA $970.85 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,040.85 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
